title: The State of LLMs 2025: From Chat Boxes to Inference-Time Scaling
author: AI Dev Digest
excerpt: A technical breakdown of the major shifts in LLM engineering for 2025: the decline of classical RAG, the rise of inference-time scaling, and local tool-use architectures.
